description: Upcoming school and sports media days / picture days. The weekly blog poster reads this file to write a post about whatever is coming up in the next 14 days. Add new entries as you schedule them; remove or keep old ones -- events with dates in the past are ignored automatically.

events.notes: Retake day scheduled for May 6. Students should wear school-appropriate attire. Order forms due by April 20.
Team and individual portraits. Players should arrive in full game uniform. Coaches photographed at 12:30.
Rain date: May 10. Bring alternate jersey for secondary shots.
